Name: insert_exercise_log_sets
SQL: WITH insert_data AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT $1::uuid AS "parent_id", $2::int4 AS "reps" UNION ALL SELECT $3::uuid AS "parent_id", $4::int4 AS "reps") AS data), _mutation_result AS (INSERT INTO "public"."exercise_log_sets" ("parent_id", "reps") SELECT insert_data."parent_id", insert_data."reps" FROM insert_data RETURNING *), post_check AS (SELECT CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM _mutation_result WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM "public"."exercise_logs" g WHERE _mutation_result."parent_id" = g."id" AND _mutation_result."parent_kind" = g."kind" AND g."owner_id" = $5::uuid)) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM _mutation_result) THEN 1 ELSE (SELECT 0 FROM (SELECT constellation_throw_error('check constraint of an insert/update permission has failed', 'ZZ901')) x) END AS status), mutation_result AS (SELECT * FROM _mutation_result WHERE (SELECT status FROM post_check) = 1) SELECT json_build_object('affected_rows', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mutation_result), 'returning', (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(row_to_json("_e")), '[]'::json) FROM (SELECT mutation_result."parent_id" AS "parent_id", mutation_result."reps" AS "reps" FROM mutation_result) AS "_e"))
